Lanuages/gifsklang.title: The Gifstadian Lanuage
Lanuages/gifsklang.content: Gifstadian is a **Teutonic language** originating in Gifstad. It was the most spoken language in the world in SL1 and SL2. It has many dialects in nations such as the The United Realms (UR for short), Anglion and Vinna Tyaja and Columbia. The Gifstadian language also has dialects in territories under Gifstad proper such as Nordvik and Fjordheim.

sidebarFields.label: Countries that spoke it
sidebarFields.value: The Commonwealth of Gifstad, United Realms, Anglion, Vinna Tyaja, Columbia

sidebarFields.label: Dialects
sidebarFields.value: Nordvikian, Fjordheimic, Anglion and VT dialects

Countries/united-kingdom-of-great-anglio.title: United Kingdom of Great Anglion
Countries/united-kingdom-of-great-anglio.content: United Kingdom of Great Anglion is the island nation between continents of Varna and Karyma. It is geographically considered inside the continent of Varna but more specifically North Varna [not to be confused with the north varna pact]. Unlike what most think, Anglion is actually not a continuation of Angland, while sharing the same name in the first 2 weeks of SL2, both nations are two different monarchies ruled by different dynasties and looking over different ethnic groups of people.

Provinces/nordvik.title: Nordvik
Provinces/nordvik.content:
Nordvik is a province of Gifstad and also a City that lies on multiple provinces including Nordvik proper [provinces include Lyngstua and Dovrebekk]. The province is one of the most populated provinces excluding Helligstad what it ties with in total population. The province has long lasting influences upon Gifstad such as it's appearance in SL2 primarily as "Deneb" and an autonomous region of The Gifsk Commonwealth.

## Geographic Location
Nordvik is situated North West of Gifstad and disconnected from the mainland only linked via oceans. The Island is also considered a "rectangle" when compared onto actual maps. This is due to it's very Rectangle like appearance from an outsider's view. The only other landmass not belonging to Gifstad near Nordvik used to belong to Nitvas however the annexation of western lands of Nitvas made Nordvik surrounded by Gifsk lands.

People/rainbow-lolcat.title: Rainbow Lolcat
People/rainbow-lolcat.content:
Rainbow lolcat was one of the many gifstadians before the 'great migration crisis' of gifstad. He was introduced into gifstad by sebisuper9mil who cared for the orphan who had no other place to go. He spent his life studying gifstad and was always striving for gifstad's growth. He also took a career in economics seeing gifstad as his father-figure who he would tend to in his later days.

# Early Life in SL0
In SL0, rainbow had deep monarchist views believing the deposition of the monarchy was illegal and that a poll was needed for a restoration of the monarchy. He with GuiM2 would work together via the political party the "Libcons" who are often an overlooked SL0 that didn't run in many elections after SL0 and considered close allies to the Conservative party led by Stefan neerkawl, the second king of Gifstad who was deposed.  

# Faith
When he grew up up he became a devote sealist and worked hard to climb the ranks and become a arch-bishop. He also protected sealists from many persecutions in gifstad due to his small-time influence there. That would soon change.

# GEU's creation
Initially, rainbow a long with new migrants created the etterretningsforeningsklubb or "ESK" for short. It was intended as a intelligence agency to collect important information but the agency was short lived. Rainbow changed its goals constantly until he settled for something. 

He then make the Nordvik group where he would use all the wealth he made into a super-company. He then merged with the GEU [Gifstadian Economic Union] to make the GEU [The same name] being the head of operations there in exchange of keeping the name of their rivals.

# LOW
Later on, rainbow still kept onto his wealthy image, even founding the LOW [League of Wealth] with many other GEU members but the party was led by Golixmany who became Prime Minister in a historic coalition with the SDPG [Social Democratic Party of Gifstad]. When Golix became PM however, golix was proposed union with Solaris but even with public support he was later pressured into backing off and in consequence leaving LOW to be lead by rainbow.

# Scandals
### Ninja scandals
When in the GEU, rainbow was prompted by a sketchy member to join a discord server that later was revealed to be a plot to be murder sitting prime minister sebisuper9mil. Although rainbow did not see any planning and left the sketchy server promptly after. However when investigators found rainbow had previously joined the server, they assumed he was a part of the plot and tried to arrest him. He was evidently furious and led an investigation against the criminals to prove his innocence.

### Nordgate
Another case involving rainbow was "Nordgate" what was a document that accused rainbow and GEU members of plotting a coup. While rainbow led a "coup" it was a riot to lower taxes. This document however accused rainbow and other highly profiled GEU members of attempting to control the Gifstadian parliament. The document initiated an investigation by sitting prime minister sebisuper9mil who checked through the GEU's private channels and prompted rainbow to ban sebi for looking through secretive information of the GEU. When this happened, rainbow was threatened by sebisuper9mil to let him back in or he would reveal the private link to the GEU's server. Rainbow retorted back that he would close off the server from invites if that happened.

However, under pressure from his peers in the GEU, rainbow allowed sebisuper9mil to continue. While some evidence was extracted, most of it was discredited as out of context or clearly internal jokes from GEU members [such as a screenshot taken by sebisuper9mil of eee saying quote "Yes [line break] When we take control and kill democracy"]. 

Both scandals turned public favor of the GEU and thus LOW that had to be distanced from the GEU for it's own sake however nothing legal perused due to the claims of the "coup planning" being discredited as mentioned earlier. 

# Judaical career
Rainbow following accusations of plotting against sitting PM of Gifstad, Sebisuper9mil decided to prove his innocence by proving guilt of the criminals. He then headed operations to trial the nationalists who attempted to attack sebi - his closest to family except Gifstad [due to the fact sebi fostered him as an orphan in SL0]. All nationalists were trialed guilty.

He then later on became a supreme judge, trialing criminals such as Bear [someone who did modern slavery to his workers] and reformed the gifstad parliament using the low party formed but not headed by him [well once headed].

# Death
Just like other influential Gifstadians, rainbow would die at the hands of the First Nitvas Meteor that destroyed a big chunk of Nitvas. He hid his money and wealth in Nordvik, lands that would be inside SL2 deneb. While the treasurer was never found a long with Ninja's teeth what was stored in it, it is still one of the biggest hidden treasures.

People/golix-von-many.title: Golix von Many
People/golix-von-many.content:
Golix was part of the first wave of the immigration crisis, in his case he was wandering the globe in search for a place to settle. Until [rainbow21173](https://gifsk.wiki/#People/rainbow-lolcat) found and invited him to Gifstad, this sparked the beginning for Golix.

# Early Life
Year 1, this was a rather chaotic time where Golix decided to live in Skattvakt a city in southern Gifstad. Golix was rather "poor" upon arrival and struggled to come by sparking his motivation for money, due to these struggles golix wanted no other to struggle for money and decided that Gifstad needed to be rich.

# Founding of the modern GEU
Year 2, Golix founded the Gifstad Economic Union  to improve the economy by making companies work together, though he was not the only one as rainbow lolcat felt the same and made the Nordvikian group with rather the same goal. Due to this they united to make the Gifstad Economic Union and sparked the original economic boom.

# LOW
After the "merger" of GEU Golix was also introduced to the League of Wealth a  political representation of the economic dream. Rather soon Golix took charge of LOW and entered politics, the first elections with the help of LOW was a success allowing Golix the position of Economic minister and grow the economy. After this he barely managed to become Prime minister the elections after, reaching his peak. The rest was only downhill however.

# LOW's shortcoming
When golix became ruler, he was one the few people to become Prime Minister of Gifstad in SL1, he was eager and showing people the halls of Ruler chat but he made a mistake. Golix was offered by Hero II of Cyrusean to union with his domain of Solaris. Golix decided to poll with the population a majority actually agreed to the union.

However, Golix's decision despite public approval was met with outcry from all sides especially a new faction called the NRC [National Republican Coalition] with a strong voice [Lementation, a refugee from Stockstrand] who used LOW's weakness and also SDPG being associated to their advantage and won the election by a historic landslide. This caused Goli's abdication from chairman of LOW and quietened down his involvement in the GEU.

People/brrreadi-breadman-gifstadian-poli.title: Brrreadi Breadman | Gifstadian Politician
People/brrreadi-breadman-gifstadian-poli.content:
# General Info

**Brrreadi Breadman** (Gifstadian **Brrrødi Brødmann** ⓘ; Day X – 17 Febuary Year 20) was a Gifstadian politician who served as the **governor of Lyngstua** and as the leader of the **(FAR) Fatherland** (previously known as the Smart Voting) from 10th of July Year 2 until **his death in Year 20**. Before his independent campagin in politics, he served as as member of the **League of Wealth**, while also being one of the founding members and later as the head of marketing for the **Gifstad Economic Union** (Previously known as the Nordvikkian Group) and also as the head of the **NORDCON Group** until his death due to an assassination.

# Early Life

Due to Brrreadi refusing to provide a factual date of his birth, only speculations can be made. Born somewhere in **Helligstad**, lived and studied in the city. During the **Migrant Crisis**, he alongside a group of future GEU founders moved to the city of Nordvik in case of a **coup and/or a nationalist takeover**. Not long after, he formed the **Nordvikkian Broadcasting Group** and the **NORDTECH Private Civilian-Military Technological Conglomerate**.

# Career in politics

After a major vote within the GEU to form the **League of Wealth**, he himself alongside multiple other members of the group joined the political party. His membership in LoW served for not a long time as after the political party proposed a coalition with **SDPG**. Due to his historical fights and differences, usually in relation to the Migration Crisis and bad management during it, he decided to leave the party for **"the better future of this whole group"**. During the times without a party, Brrreadi served as a major propagandist against monarchist and anti-democratic groups within Gifstad and outside of it, later the idea being called **Breadism **built on hatred for any kinds of authoritarianism and beliefs in a ultra democratic process. On 10th of July Year 2, he decided to officially form the **Smart Voting Initiative**, a centrist republicanist big-tent, with the idea to gain as many votes from supporters of **SDPG** and the **Conservative Party (Now GNEP)**. The original start was seen terribly, mainly due to the radical methods of marketing to gain voters, going as far to call SDPG "NSDAP" and label the Conservative Party as being anti-democratic and extremely authoritarian. After gaining only 4% in the **12/27 Gifstadian Parliamentary Elections** he decided to rebrand the political party into what now is known as the **"Fatherland - Allied Republic"** (known also as the "Fatherland" or "(FAR) Fatherland", his new rebrand had allowed for the party to gain some traction from the community within Gifstad. During this time, he appointed **Commanzerhanz **as the Head of the Party Committee. This propelled the party forward by enough points to be known as one of the more major politicians in Gifstad, solely due to the fact as he was the only opposition party in the nation. During the **1/3 Gifstad Parliamentary Elections** his party managed to secure 5% of the votes, still out of the coalition.

# Breadism

While **Breadism** was never publicly named by him, the idea involved around following the plans of the **Brrreadi Doctrine**, a political ideology based on a mix of **ultra democracy **and strong **anti-authoritarianism**, which proposes a decentralized **confederate-style** democracy in which every idea is put into a form of **dialogue **between those that support in and those that are against to find a common compromise. The idea also supports **jinogist **interventionism against nations that are authoritarian and pose a threat to national sovereignty. The name itself was first seen used by ex-supporters of the **Fatherland Party** after his death.

# First Coalition

Somewhere on 17 July Year 17, talks between Brrreadi and **Salmon**, Head of the Party Committee were formed to possibly establish a coalition-party between (FAR) Fatherland and **Liberal-Conservative Party**. After some talks, the Chairman of the LCP **Gui **agreed on establishing a coalition-party, now known as the **National Republican Coalition** which later also included the **National Republican Alliance**, a party formed by **Transcended**. Later on July of Year 19, he was appointed as **governor of Lyngstua** due to him being the only government member from this region and also due to the upcoming regional reform.

# Death

On 17 of Febuary Year 20, exactly three years after first coalition talks begun, Brrreadi alongside tons of other politicians and family members attended the **funeral of V.M. Stefan Neerkawl**. Before the funeral, Brrreadi had made jokes surrounding the death of Stefan, saying "Partying in Gifstad". During the funeral however, he expressed remorse, giving his apologies to the Neerkwal family, mainly Stefan and Bjorn. As the funeral ended, Brreadi alongside **Transcended **and **Partisan **were killed after reportedly a "thor-like hammer" struck them down, causing major damage and for the viking ship the funeral was held to sink. The government of Gifstad has refused to further continue investigations, based on lack of evidence and at that time ongoing elections. Later reports have came in that both Transcended and Partisan survived as they both hired **body doubles** to avoid going themselves to the funeral. However due to lack of any concrete proof and the fact that the ship that sank is missing, bodies of Brreadi and possibly Transcended and Partisan cannot be put onto an autopsy. **Funeral without a body** was held in his at that time home state of Lyngustia. Due to him never sharing any info detailing his family, possibly them being dead, it was only attended by members of his party and local supporters.

# Conspiracies about the event

Due to the nature surrounding the whole event, many **conspiracy theories** have been formed by minds of thousands. One of the most popular one, often being cited as truth and being spread by **pro-Neerkwalist media**, the cause of death is **revenge of Thor** for the anti-Neerkwalist comments made by the victims of the attack. This claim is also spread due to the lack of the wreckage of the ship. It is most possibly that it had been towed by **Cosair pirates** which are active in the region. After death of Brrreadi, numerous people reported seeing sights of his **ghost **roaming and talking to people. However due to the unnatural occurrence of the event and fact that it had been seen internationally, it is likely just a joke said once too many times. Around couple of months after the death of Brrreadi, a letter appeared at the doorstep of the **House of Neerkwalists** coming from Brrreadi to **Bjorn**. The mail itself has not been released and the house refuses to comment on the event. It is likely just a possible troll made by a member of the FAR party (due to the official party seal being on the mail) but due to the unusual action of the house, it is unknown if it was really Brrreadi or not.

# Post-Death events

After the de-jure death of Brrreadi, the wealth was repurposed by the **government of Gifstad** and all his properties were put on the free market to be sold. His corporations, both the **Nordvikkian Broadcasting Group **and **NORDTECH Private Civilian-Military Technological Conglomerate** were originally put under a management by a council, mandated by the **Gifstad Economic Union**. On 3rd of August Year 20, both corporations declared that they would be acquired under a new management. NORDTECH went to **Echo**, a major Gifstadian military designer while NBG went to **Salmons**, current **Prime Minister of Gifstad**. His monetary and **stock** wealth were given to his **coalition members** as he had not written a will.

# Re-emerging

When the **doomsday event** begun, the politician Brrreadi himself re-emerged in **Lyngstua**. He informed that all the time he was alive, just that he went into hiding. With the **world ending** he and some of his supporters went to his **grave site** and celebrated the end together like a good family.

People/visonaruisa-maria-pera-botarte-th.title: Visonaruisa Maria Pera-Botarte the 2nd
People/visonaruisa-maria-pera-botarte-th.content:
Maria II of Columbia was a Columbian political and military figure who became the nation’s final Visonariusa, serving as its monarch following the death of her predecessor. Initially appointed Admiral of the Navy, she later assumed the role of Prime Minister before rising to supreme leadership. Her rule was marked by a largely neutral and stable foreign policy, emphasizing internal development and cautious diplomacy during a formative period in Columbia’s history.

# Admiral life
In their early life as a Columbian, Maria was allowed to pursue a career in the Columbian navy. She never engaged in actual warfare but the skills learnt as an admiral proved useful for later paths in her life. It would be a key factor in her campaigning for Prime Minister and facilitating consistently the **biggest** navy in SL2 for a time.

# Political Career
Maria II’s political career began during the early formation of Columbia, when she entered the nation’s first prime ministerial election and became Prime Minister by default. During her time in office, she was noted for consulting citizens on major decisions and maintaining a cautious, stability-focused approach to governance even when tensions with the Suralic Federation, United Realms and Gifstad was high. 

# Life as Monarch
When Visonaruisa Maria Pera the first of Columbia died due to cancer, Maria II of Columbia ascended to the throne as queen. Her rule oversaw the biggest economic increases that an SL nation has ever experienced with an approximated 9,181.36% GDP jump from 18 billion to 1,670,645,292,979.95.

Provinces/rainbowtz-island.title: Rainbowtz Island
Provinces/rainbowtz-island.content:
Rainbowtz island is a private island owned by the Fern family. The island served a strategic and defensive purpose to Gifstad. The island also had many different variations like rainbow island, rainbowtz isle and more. The ownership of the island has switched in limited quantities. Officially it was a condominium of Gifstad and Solaris but most operations of the actual territory was held to RON [Royal Order of Neerkawlia].




# Purchase
## Before being called rainbowtz Island
Initially, the island was owned and managed by the Sealist state who colonized the territory on the 20th of February, 2025 in a historic purchase with Vinna Tyaja. The island then wasn't mentioned or used much, a forgotten island just like a lot of other Sealist island possessions. These islands however would be bought [some] in a phase of decolonization from the Sealist selling islands for cheap to other nations.  

## Why buy an island?
Rainbow previously was allowed to expand in Neerkawlia by buying massive plots of it [he owned 3/10ths of Neerkawlia] but Brrreadi [not to be confused with the SL1 or other SL2 characters in different nations to Gifstad] and her new legislation blocked the sale of territory of massive Gifstadian lands. Rainbow with this news wanted to still expand so he decided to look for an island to settle with his general Blank.

## The search for an island
Before finding rainbowtz island, rainbow was in negotiations with the Marienland and Anglion rulers. He offered solid cash for both territories but was denied due to either cultural significance of the Islands or low balling the price. Rainbow, almost giving up the search of an island, was offered by the Tsar of Marwanid [Tsar Caliph Khalid al Marwanid] offered rainbow to make a condominium with him. He would control a port called Port Brrreadi and rainbow would be free to operate the rest of the island.

## Buying the island
Rainbow with this news would agree to the buying the island with 325,000. The money would go from the Tsar to Blue the cat [current leader of the sealists at the time]. The island purchase marks a turning point of RON and it's purpose to the monarchy and Gifstad.




# Development of the Island
## Defenses
To protect the island from dangers, rainbow and his general Blank made multiple measures to prevent invasion. These include, forts [castles or coastal forts]. The island would also have a massive underground train system, housing, bunkers and farms to prevail in sieges against foreign enemies. The order would continuously scavenge these plans but never needed to enact them.

## Castles
Unlike most nations, rainbowtz had a culture of building grand castles. They were "defensive" but mostly aesthetic mansions with defenses. The castles also never were used for defensive purposes due to no direct threat [such as a siege] but there was a scare due to how far rainbowtz island was from the mainland.

## Resources
In a siege, rainbowtz needed resources and tools for extended periods of time. Rainbow and Blank thus constructed mining operations for raw resources to be processed and used, smithing workshops for tools, farms and more. Rainbow had a method of hiding this by selling commercial exports like shows to the mainland.




# Times of distress
During the existence of rainbowtz island, there have been close calls where the island was under direct threat of invasions or utilization in warfare due to it's utter closeness to Vinna Tyaja, a nation often riddled with conflict.

## 2GNW 
In 2GNW, the sides were Marwanid-Solaris [Previously just Marwanid but unified into Solaris], Elysia, Stockstrand, UR and Teutonika against the NVC [Severmarque and Gifstad]. This situation could of involved the annexation of rainbowtz island fully into Gifstad or Marwanid due to their troops stationed [Although Gifstad had reportedly more troops there] in the nation and UR's naval presence. However, Tsar Caliph Khalid al Marwanid and Lementation Isvegr agreed to make the condominium a peace zone despite plans that would allow for the occupation by rainbowtz forces under RON.

## 3GNW
Similarly, both Solaris with their Grand regent respected the peace on the island. However, a threat of the Suralic Federation occupying and even annexing the island was real due to how it was MUCH closer to SF than Gifstad. This however never happened because proper invasions never commenced due to the 2nd Nitvas Meteor hitting SL2.

Organization/royal-order-of-neerkawlia.title: Royal Order of Neerkawlia
Organization/royal-order-of-neerkawlia.content:
The Royal Order of Neerkawlia is an order [based on holy orders but formed under a more royalist intention] made and served by their first leader Rainbowtz Fern Neerkawl [the second]. The order had many purposes and transformed throughout it's lifespan into more corporate, managing and political goals. While many may of not saw the purpose of the order, it was primarily the protection of the Konge.

# Recruitment of Blank
The order started out with only rainbow [the founder and leader]. He however understood the responsibility of creating and enforcing a military order and knew he needed Generals, not just for more commanders but also for bureaucratic reasons. In interviews, he found Blank. Blank was a young Gifstadian recruit and in rainbow's eyes fit for the role as his helping hand in RON.

Blank's recruitment proved useful. His skills helped facilitate the growth of RON's influence in Neerkawlia and expand operations throughout Gifstad including places such as Kaldarse.

# Fortifications and Naval bases in Neerkawlia
With RON growing, barracks, forts and even naval capabilities were increased of the RON forces in Neerkawlia. The paramilitary thrived with limited pushback from the central government due to the limited harm of a strong force loyal to the Konge and thus shared interests to parliment in the defense of the realm.

# The formation of NOon
The Naval Order of Neerkawlia [abbreviated often to NOon], was a subbranch of RON designated to the naval presence of RON. It served well in it's capabilities and was notable for it's raids of Anglion settlements by Lementation Isvegr [the admiral of NOon at the time]. The order had a peak of 3160 [all served primarily for Gifstad but were owned and operated by NOon].

# The push out of the mainland
## Banning of purchasing plots
A primary way of rainbow's success with RON was the freedom the government used to give to paramilitaries / purchasing of plots. However new legislation by Brrreadi [not to be confused with the SL1 or other SL2 characters in different nations to Gifstad] and her new legislation blocked the sale of territory of massive Gifstadian lands. Rainbow with this news wanted to still expand so he decided to look for an island to settle with his general Blank. 

This island happened to be rainbowtz island, an island near Vinna Tyaja and it also became a condominium with the state of Marwanid. The island then started to become the base of most of RON's operations. This included industrially, defensively and culturally. 

## Banning of Paramilitaries
Another reason of rainbow's push out of the mainland was the banning of paramilitaries. Due to actions committed by the ACC of Gifstad [mostly Void and Ninja], the Gifstadian government set strict rules against paramilitaries. This ban would lead to a bigger push of RON to integrate with the main Gifstadian military. While most operations were on rainbowtz island at the time, this ban did not help.

# RON's greater goals
While said before, RON had no concrete purpose as an organization. It had its hands in many fields such as the political space with the GLU, it dived into travel with Rainbowtz Air and it managed a territory with easily 1 million people residing inside it's borders. The order, while not perfect, had a lot to juggle and one of the few popular organizations in Bugaria as a whole. 

While the order ended with the catastrophic hit of the 2nd Nitvas meteor upon SL, it's legacy molded Gifstad and helped influence Gifstad long term and it's members went on to do a lot for Gifstad itself.

Political Party/the-gifstadian-loyalist-.title: The Gifstadian Loyalist Party
Political Party/the-gifstadian-loyalist-.content:
The Gifstadian Loyalist Party or GLU for short is a political party founded by Lementation Isvegr and Rainbowtz Fern Neerkawl as a splinter party from the United Parties of Gifstad [abbreviated to UPG]. While both parties are monarchist, the GLU hold a more monarchist favoritism due to their deep links to the monarchy with rainbowtz being a Neerkawl [the ruling house of Gifstad] and also leading RON [the Royal Order of Neerkawlia]. The party is also a branch of RON functionally.

# Creation
The GLU was made at a time where the NCU [New Conservative Union] was dominating Gifstadian politics. The leader of the party [Salmon] however was a republican. While pro monarchists were in the party, the only real stronghold of the monarchy was clearly the UPG. Previously, rainbow worked with the UPG and often voted them in elections due to their ties and also their support of RON and their efforts.

However, when Lementation Isvegr was involved into RON, he argued that the leader of the UPG [N/A, that is his nickname not something meaning we don't know] was incompetent as a leader. He would point out N/A's failure leading offenses against severmark in GNW and if he couldn't hold a front how could he hold a nation. Rainbow was convinced later on and agreed to form the GLU with Lementation.

# Political success
The GLU when formed and ran in the May 23rd election of 2025, they won 5 votes from a population base of 28. This would make them the second biggest party [behind the NCU with 6] and bigger than the UPG by 3 votes. This clearly marked their presence in parliment, allowing them to influence political decisions in Gifstad. They got the same result next election at the 30th of may however the Gifstadian Left won at 8 votes with 29 votes in total in the election.

This vote would mark a turning point however with Elysia's ultimatum against Gifstad and the initiation of 2GNW. This ultimatum initially was accepted by the Prime Minister however a massive fury from the Gifstadian parliment and populous caused an overturn in decision. This would incur a deposition of the PM [Pingu] and his arrest. This however, meant someone had to step up to lead Gifstad through this.

# 2GNW and it's boost to GLU
With the looming threat of Elysia and their allies, Lem was hailed the PM of Gifstad and a war cabinet was formed primarily with GLU control. While the situation was desperate and people such as Brrreadi leaving the nation saying Gifstad was doomed, the nation prevailed. A historic win against a coalition of both Solarian and Teutonikan forces led by Ninja led to the defeat of both nations and thus their leave and Fisherman's campaigns against Stockstrand caused dropouts from both Elysia and Stockstrand.

# Consequences of the wins
With the military success of the GLU, they easily won the next election [14 to GLU, 11 to NCU and 4 to GPP] but lost the next election due to a lack of support and Lem's slow transition from being PM of Gifstad [12 to NCU and 11 to GLU]. Then the last election they appeared in was the 20th of June election where the NCU won 8 while the GLU won 7.

# The fall of the GLU
The GLU's fall was due to many factors. One reason is due to the fact the GLU's leader Lementation stepped down as party lead. A second reason [the most major] is due to the fact most of the party members were no longer inside or active in Gifstad. Blank was still in kaldarse for operation K, rainbow died and his son [rainbowtz fern neerkawl the third] moved to Columbia and Lementation quit politics and only worked a simple general for Gifstad.
